medical_history.chief_complaint: cough associated with thick gelatinous expectoration and dyspnea
medical_history.history_of_present_illness: Symptoms started 6-8 hours prior to presentation. She had a history of congenital heart disease for which she had undergone Fontan procedure in her infancy. Prior to this episode, she had multiple similar episodes and was diagnosed with plastic bronchitis.
medical_history.past_medical_history: Congenital heart disease, Fontan procedure in infancy, plastic bronchitis

physical_examination.general_examination: Initially stable vitals, then developed hypoxia with oxygen saturation dropping to 90% requiring 100% FiO2
physical_examination.specialty_examination: On inspection, there was a large plaque like secretion completely obstructing the left main bronchus extending beyond the carina into the trachea.
